gazette: The Official Gazette dated April 20, 2023, and numbered 32169
title: Changes have been made to the Decree on State Aid in Investments
bodyHtml:
Changes have been made to the Decree on State Aid in Investments (No. 2012/3305) through which:

Investment types prioritized for regional support applied in the 5th region, including investments within the scope of the Digital Transformation Support Program and Green Transformation Support Program, as well as investments directed towards the production of products or components documented by an assigned monitoring report or, if available, the relevant Evaluation and Control Committee decision, resulting from R&D projects carried out in R&D centers within the scope of Law No. 5746, will be able to benefit from regional support, provided that they are not located in the 6th region.

Vertical farming/greenhouse investments within the scope of controlled urban farming, where the entire photosynthesis process is provided by artificial light (US-97 Code: 0112.0.10) and the total area of the layers used for production is a minimum of 1000 m2, will be eligible for regional support in the regions where such support is applicable.

Investments in controlled urban farming/vertical farming/greenhouse projects where the entire photosynthesis process is provided by artificial light and the total area of the layers used for production is below 1000 m2, and investments where the total area of the layers used for production is 1000 m2 or more, have been added to the list of investments that are not eligible for incentives.

Please click here for the Decree Amending the Decree on State Aid in Investments (Decision No. 7108).
